title: Rescue Beacon
briefing: A distress beacon was detected in the debris field. Investigate and recover any survivors.
fieldGuide: Bring hazard protection. The crash zone contains radiation pockets and unstable wreckage.

objectives.label: Reach the distress beacon
objectives.detail: Navigate to the marked location on your HoloMap.

objectives.label: Defend the recovery zone
objectives.detail: Hold position for 60 seconds while the signal stabilizes.
